name: pr-automerge
description: PreToolUse(Bash) auto-merge router for `gh pr create`, implemented in hexa-lang (`_pr_automerge.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). When a Bash command starts with `gh pr create …` and is not draft / not already chained to a merge, it is rewritten via the hook `updatedInput` field to append ` && gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch` — transparent atomic create-then-merge. Enforces commons @D g47 (PR ship discipline — no unmerged stacks). Skip conditions: `--draft` flag present · command already contains `gh pr merge` · command chained with `&&` / `;` / `|` (multi-step intent preserved). NO opt-out by design (commons @D g30).
